TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Darrell Armstrong sraral hya ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 6 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga North Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 183 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 77 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *arrell arms~…ētroŇč s~…ēraral ńßja …£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a nortńß ¶~ ®arolina, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Darrell Armstrong sraral hya ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1968, byacing te 6 ru 22 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga North Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 183 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 77 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
